title: Missing Each Other
author: Edward S. Brodkin, Ashley Pallathra
subline: How to be in the same room again.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- Two faces in profile, facing each other, but misaligned vertically — one a little higher than the other. A red line connects the eyes, missing. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1050)" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2">
    <!-- Left face (looking right) -->
    <g transform="translate(-460 0)">
      <path d="M 0 -180 Q 80 -180 80 -100 L 80 0 Q 80 60 50 100 L 60 180 L 30 140 L 0 80 Q -50 60 -50 0 L -50 -100 Q -50 -180 0 -180 Z"/>
      <circle cx="40" cy="-60" r="6" fill="#ffffff"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Right face (looking left) -->
    <g transform="translate(460 80)">
      <path d="M 0 -180 Q -80 -180 -80 -100 L -80 0 Q -80 60 -50 100 L -60 180 L -30 140 L 0 80 Q 50 60 50 0 L 50 -100 Q 50 -180 0 -180 Z"/>
      <circle cx="-40" cy="-60" r="6" fill="#ffffff"/>
    </g>
    <!-- A red line that ALMOST connects the eyes — but misses by a small amount, and is dashed -->
    <line x1="-414" y1="990" x2="414" y2="1070" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="6 8"/>
    <!-- Whisper labels -->
    <text x="-460" y="240" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">YOU</text>
    <text x="460" y="320" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">THEM</text>
    <!-- A small wifi-signal symbol on the left (the phone that's between them) — three arcs -->
    <g transform="translate(-460 -240)" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" fill="none" opacity="0.7">
      <path d="M -24 12 Q 0 -16 24 12"/>
      <path d="M -36 24 Q 0 -36 36 24"/>
      <path d="M -48 36 Q 0 -56 48 36"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="16" r="3" fill="#4c4c4c"/>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Two facing profile silhouettes, slightly misaligned vertically — the visual of 'we're both here, but our eyes don't meet.' A dashed red line between the eyes shows the connection almost-but-not-quite made. A small wifi icon over one head suggests the screen mediating. 280px whisper title at the bottom.
